overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring the Dogtown district. The player walks through a sunlit post-apocalyptic urban environment featuring a distinctive yellow cylindrical building, abandoned plaza with a large bowl-shaped stadium structure, covered walkways, and finally descends into a canal waterway with dense tropical vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: desertified urban plaza with distinctive yellow cylindrical building

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter of the yellow cylindrical building, observing the post-apocalyptic architecture

entered.detail: distinctive multi-story yellow building with curved balconies and large metal framework dome on roof
geodesic metal structure atop the yellow building
tropical palm tree in concrete planter
wide staircase leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a distinctive yellow cylindrical building with a metal dome structure. The player walks forward through a sandy, desertified urban area with scattered palm trees and concrete architecture under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street approaching large plaza intersection

events.description: exiting the immediate yellow building area into the open plaza street with wider view

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the asphalt street toward the plaza, passing abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking along the right side of the street

entered.detail: large stadium-like bowl-shaped structure visible in the distance
tall cranes silhouetted against the sky behind buildings
multi-story building with green painted exterior and yellow accents

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the enclosed yellow building area onto a wider asphalt street. The bowl-shaped stadium structure becomes visible in the distance, and construction cranes rise above the skyline. The environment shows signs of urban decay with abandoned vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with abandoned stadium structure and military presence

events.description: approaching the large bowl-shaped stadium structure with military vehicle parked nearby

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward the bowl structure, observing the military vehicle and gathered NPCs

notable_agents.action: military armored vehicle parked near the bowl structure with soldiers nearby
group of people standing and conversing near the military vehicle

entered.detail: dark armored military vehicle with yellow markings
tall cylindrical structure with pink and red painted exterior

segments.scene_description: The player enters a large open plaza dominated by the massive bowl-shaped stadium structure. A military vehicle is parked prominently near the bowl, with several NPCs gathered around it. The pink cylindrical tower becomes visible on the right as the player advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with colorful glass canopy leading to canal descent

events.description: entering the covered walkway with arched metal supports and colored glass panels
descending stairs into the lower canal waterway area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade then descending stairs into the canal

notable_agents.action: two people walking together under the covered walkway

entered.detail: arched metal structure with transparent colored panels overhead
metal safety railing along the edge of the descending canal

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway with colorful glass panels overhead, passing by NPCs. The pink cylindrical tower looms large on the right. At the end of the walkway, the player descends stairs into a lower canal area with tropical vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: drainage canal waterway with overgrown tropical vegetation

events.description: entering the canal waterway with green-tinted water and dense palm trees on both sides

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the shallow canal waterway, passing under the curved building overhangs

notable_agents.action: person in bright green jacket running ahead through the canal

entered.detail: concrete canal with shallow green water and algae
modern building with curved concrete overhangs extending over the canal
aerial vehicle hovering in the sky above the canal

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow canal waterway with green-tinted water, flanked by dense tropical vegetation and curved modern architecture. An aerial vehicle hovers in the distance, and a figure in green runs ahead through the canal.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal terminus with exit stairs and dense palm grove

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the canal where stairs lead back up to street level

entered.detail: concrete staircase leading up from the canal to the street above

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the canal as the player approaches a set of exit stairs leading upward. The canal is overgrown with dense palm trees and tropical plants, with graffiti covering the walls. The aerial vehicle continues to hover in the distance as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit, decaying urban district that gradually descends from open plazas into a lush, overgrown canal. It begins by moving past a distinctive yellow cylindrical building through a sandy, desertified street under a bright midday sun. As the camera advances onto wider asphalt roads, the view expands to reveal a massive bowl-shaped stadium and distant construction cranes before entering a large plaza where military vehicles and NPCs gather. The scene then shifts into a covered walkway with colorful glass panels and a looming pink tower, leading the camera down a set of stairs into a lower waterway. Finally, the movement continues through a narrow canal flanked by dense tropical vegetation and graffiti-covered walls, following a running figure while an aerial vehicle hovers in the distance.
